title: charred pillowy croatian paella rice paella
description: a lacto-vegetarian-friendly, wok-hei, brunch-mood croatian dish featuring paella rice. crispy on the outside, fluffy on the inside.
instructions: heat the oil in a large paella pan over medium-high heat.
saute the onion, garlic, and bell pepper until the vegetables are tender.
add the mushrooms and cook until they release their liquid and start to brown.
add the tomato, smoked paprika, thyme, salt, and pepper, and stir to combine.
add the paella rice and stir to coat the rice in the oil and mix with the vegetables.
cook the rice for 2-3 minutes, stirring constantly.
add 2 cups of water to the pan and bring to a boil.
reduce the heat to low and simmer, covered, for 20-25 minutes, or until the rice is cooked and the liquid has been absorbed.
increase the heat to high and cook, uncovered, for 5-7 minutes, or until the bottom of the pan is crispy and golden brown.
remove the pan from the heat and sprinkle with grated cheese.
let the paella rest for 5 minutes before serving.
